metadata.title: Boutique House at Praia do Patacho | Casas Ella & Nina - Alagoas
metadata.description: Casa Ella & Nina is an exclusive boutique house at Praia do Patacho, Alagoas. Enjoy comfort, privacy and a perfect retreat. Book now and live this unique experience!

ambientes.introP1: Our boutique houses offer spaces designed with comfort and elegance.
ambientes.introP2: Enjoy private leisure areas and cozy bedrooms that combine artisanal style with modernity.
ambientes.introP3: Everything designed to provide unique, relaxing moments while you enjoy the natural beauty of Alagoas.
ambientes.modalIntro: If you're looking for privacy, comfort and a unique experience in one of the most beautiful destinations on the Brazilian coast, Casa Boutique is the perfect retreat. Ideal for couples, our house accommodates up to two adults and offers an exclusive stay amid the lush nature of Porto de Pedras.
ambientes.modalSpaceP1: Our boutique houses offer spaces designed with comfort and elegance. Enjoy private leisure areas and cozy bedrooms that combine artisanal style with modernity. Everything designed to provide unique, relaxing moments while you enjoy the natural beauty of Alagoas.
ambientes.modalSpaceP2: With two charming, exclusive buildings, this recently opened property was designed to offer the utmost in privacy, comfort and style. In the first building, you'll enjoy a luxurious master suite, equipped with a double shower bathroom, closet and a cozy living room.
ambientes.modalSpaceP3: The second building, separate from the suite, ensures even more privacy and houses a complete, modern kitchen, perfect for preparing your meals in peace, plus a guest bathroom for your convenience.
ambientes.modalSpaceP4: Between the two buildings, a true oasis awaits you: a private pool for two, surrounded by a lush garden with loungers and a table perfect for outdoor meals. Here, luxury and practicality come together to create an unforgettable stay in a completely exclusive and welcoming setting.
ambientes.modalAccessP1: At Casa Boutique, our guests are welcomed by our receptionist Juliana, who will be on hand to ensure a smooth and comfortable stay.

faleComAnfitria.descricao: Hello! I'm Mariangela, your host at Casa Boutique Ella e Nina. I'm here to answer your questions and help you plan an incredible stay.
faleComAnfitria.whatsappMensagem: I have a question about Casas Ella e Nina
faleComAnfitria.rodape: We're ready to make your experience unforgettable!
faleComAnfitria.imagemAlt: Mariangela, host of Casa Boutique Ella e Nina

items.a: Pets are allowed, but please contact us to find out the specific conditions.

items.q: How does check-in and check-out work?
items.a: Check-in is from 2pm and check-out must be done by 12pm. We can try to accommodate alternative times, subject to availability.

items.q: What services are included in the daily rate?
items.a: The daily rate includes breakfast, room cleaning, and access to all of the property's amenities.

items.q: Is smoking allowed on the property?
items.a: Smoking is not allowed inside the accommodations. Outdoor areas are available for smokers.
